items.title: Marjon Beauchamp's name would probably produce the highest Scrabble score in an actual game.
items.author: Styron1106
items.body_excerpt: Marjon Beauchamp most likely has the highest scrabble name point possibility in an actual scrabble game. Building off this post by u/StrategyTop7612 ...... To maximize the Triple Word Score spots we would need to use a name that is 15 characters long to hit all 3 on a Scrabble…
